001 — Who I Am

I'm Oviawe Efosa Iruosa, a brand designer, web developer, and digital artist from Nigeria who goes by CryBaby. The name isn’t about emotion, it’s about obsession. I push the work until it speaks in tears.

My craft lives at the intersection of grit and beauty. I believe a brand isn't a logo, it's a feeling, a story, a world someone steps into. I build those worlds meticulously, obsessively, and with an eye for details most people never notice but always feel.

same obsession to every client, from streetwear brands and food concepts to real estate and digital platforms.

Current Role
Founder & Creative Director
Huddles Technologies Ltd — 2023 to Present
Primary Discipline
Brand Identity & Web
With a deep love for illustration and digital art
Based In
Nigeria
Working globally, building locally
002 — What I Do

My
Craft

Detail obsessed across every discipline, from the precision of a single pixel on a screen to the subtle impact of a font choice. I’m deeply sensitive to how every element shapes perception and experience. Branding is my first love, but the web is where I bring it to life, allowing it to move, respond, and breathe. With over four years of experience in design and development, I’ve worked on more than 10 branding projects and built over 20 websites as a developer, translating identity systems into functional, expressive digital experiences.

01
◈
Brand Identity
Logo systems, brand patterns, visual language, guidelines, naming strategy. Building marks that mean something.
02
◉
Web Development
Front end focused, creating fast, expressive, and detail rich websites that function as direct extensions of a brand’s identity ,personality and soul.
03
▣
App Design
UI and UX design for mobile and web applications, where every tap and every screen is intentional, structured, and carefully considered.
04
◐
Digital Art
Illustration, digital painting, conceptual artwork for brands, streetwear campaigns, and apparel graphics.
05
▦
Packaging Design
Label systems, product packaging, merch design. Making objects feel shelf stopping and collectible.
06
◇
Creative Direction
Conceptualizing campaigns, leading visual systems, ensuring everything coheres from logo to launch.
003 — Selected Work

Projects
& Cases

View Images →
PLANET SODA
Rebrand Concept · PBC
Collaboration — CryBaby × TheMarieStudio
Planet Soda
Rebrand Concept — Planet Bottling Company
A full rebrand concept for Planet Soda by Planet Bottling Company (PBC). Instead of competing with giants like Coca Cola, Fanta, and Sprite on their terms, this concept positions Planet Soda as a brand in its own visual world. The strategy is to step away from the expected and build a bold identity that stands apart so clearly that Planet Soda feels like its own category rather than part of the crowd.
Logo Design Planetary Aesthetic Metal Can Packaging Color Naming System Brand Patterns Survey Research
103
Survey Participants
We conducted a 103-person consumer survey to understand exactly what Nigerian shoppers want from packaging and design, then built the entire visual direction from those findings.
Brief

The logo, name, and packaging were designed to function as a unified system. Creative direction was guided by audience insight, ensuring every decision aligned with both the cosmic theme and customer expectations. Color choices were deliberately named to reflect planetary identities, extending the brand’s universe across every touchpoin

Packaging

Metal cans were introduced exclusively for this pitch, engineered to be bold, shelf-dominant, and instantly eye catching across all demographics. The design is built to capture attention before a single word is read. (Note: the current product line does not include metal cans; this concept was developed solely for the rebrand.)

Position By taking a visual direction that Coca Cola, Fanta, and Sprite have not explored, we positioned Planet Soda in an entirely new category, and not just a different place on the shelf.

JB
Food & Bev · Identity
Jojo's Burger
Jojo’s Burger is crafted to evoke nostalgia and a sense of longing, bringing back the calm and warmth of childhood memories. The brand is designed so that every bite feels like your very first time...eating a burger.
Logo Brand Patterns Packaging Full Identity

NR
Brand Identity · Womenswear
Noresè
A refined identity for a female Afrocentric clothing brand, rooted in elegance, cultural pride, and quiet confidence. Every detail is deliberate and every element intentional. From the logo and brand visuals to packaging and clothing tags, the vision is brought to life through a seamless blend of Bini heritage and modern elegance, celebrating the culture, beauty, and everyday sophistication of Black women.
IdentityAfrocentricTypography

GR
Real Estate
Grandeur Real Estate
A premium real estate brand identity for an African real estate company, designed to communicate aspiration, permanence, and a commanding sense of presence. The identity is built to reflect trust, stability, and long term value while positioning the brand within the upper tier of the real estate market.
Luxury BrandIdentity
View Images →
CHR
Luxury Streetwear
Chrime
A visual identity for Chrime, a luxury streetwear brand where high fashion sensibility meets street culture. From the logo to the brand language and apparel design, every element is built around exclusivity and edge. The brand embodies a romanticized, formal dark luxury seamlessly fused with street culture, crafted for the modern street elite who carry presence without chaos.

ACE

Ace Apparel

Logo Packaging T-Shirts Tracksuits Jeans
DOPE BOY An artistic & emotionally captivating collection
The Dope Boy Collection captures the spirit of Ace Apparel through bold visuals, intentional details, and cosmic-inspired aesthetics. Every artwork, number, and name in the collection tells a piece of the brand’s story, blending emotion, identity, and streetwear into a single narrative.

ETW UTOPIA Unreleased Collection
A space-themed collection for ETW Originals — conceptualized, designed, and never dropped. The Utopia collection explores cosmic aesthetics through streetwear; a glimpse into what could have been.

004 — The Company

Huddles
Technologies

"A creative technology company built on the belief that every brand deserves to be unforgettable."

Huddles Technologies is the brand studio and software company I founded in 2023 under Huddles Technologies Ltd. We work across web, mobile, brand identity, illustration, product design, and more all under one roof, all with the same relentless attention to detail.

Brand Identity
